inputs.label: Wall Length
inputs.businessContext: Total horizontal length of the wall in meters.

inputs.label: Wall Height
inputs.businessContext: Vertical height of the wall from floor to ceiling in meters.

inputs.label: Block Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of a single block including any interlocking features in millimeters.

inputs.label: Block Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of a single block in millimeters.

inputs.label: Mortar Joint Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of the mortar joint between blocks in millimeters.

inputs.label: Price per Block
inputs.businessContext: Unit price of one block in USD.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of extra blocks to account for cutting, breakage, and waste.
